title: Minimum Initial Energy to Finish Tasks
titleCn: 完成所有任务的最少初始能量

testcases.input: tasks = [[1,2],[2,4],[4,8]] Output: 8 Explanation: Starting with 8 energy, we finish the tasks in the following order: - 3rd task. Now energy = 8 - 4 = 4. - 2nd task. Now energy = 4 - 2 = 2. - 1st task. Now energy = 2 - 1 = 1. Notice that even though we have leftover energy, starting with 7 energy does not work because we cannot do the 3rd task.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: Starting with 8 energy, we finish the tasks in the following order: - 3rd task. Now energy = 8 - 4 = 4. - 2nd task. Now energy = 4 - 2 = 2. - 1st task. Now energy = 2 - 1 = 1. Notice that even though we have leftover energy, starting with 7 energy does not work because we cannot do the 3rd task.

testcases.input: tasks = [[1,3],[2,4],[10,11],[10,12],[8,9]] Output: 32 Explanation: Starting with 32 energy, we finish the tasks in the following order: - 1st task. Now energy = 32 - 1 = 31. - 2nd task. Now energy = 31 - 2 = 29. - 3rd task. Now energy = 29 - 10 = 19. - 4th task. Now energy = 19 - 10 = 9. - 5th task. Now energy = 9 - 8 = 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 32 Explanation: Starting with 32 energy, we finish the tasks in the following order: - 1st task. Now energy = 32 - 1 = 31. - 2nd task. Now energy = 31 - 2 = 29. - 3rd task. Now energy = 29 - 10 = 19. - 4th task. Now energy = 19 - 10 = 9. - 5th task. Now energy = 9 - 8 = 1.

testcases.input: tasks = [[1,7],[2,8],[3,9],[4,10],[5,11],[6,12]] Output: 27 Explanation: Starting with 27 energy, we finish the tasks in the following order: - 5th task. Now energy = 27 - 5 = 22. - 2nd task. Now energy = 22 - 2 = 20. - 3rd task. Now energy = 20 - 3 = 17. - 1st task. Now energy = 17 - 1 = 16. - 4th task. Now energy = 16 - 4 = 12. - 6th task. Now energy = 12 - 6 = 6.

Now energy = 20 - 3 = 17. - 1st task. Now energy = 17 - 1 = 16. - 4th task. Now energy = 16 - 4 = 12. - 6th task. Now energy = 12 - 6 = 6.
